text:
Once upon a time, in a small village surrounded by thick woods, there lived an owl named Oliver. Oliver loved listening to stories told by the squirrels. They spoke of far-off places and mysterious creatures.

One snowy winter evening, after hearing their tales, Oliver decided he wanted an adventure of his own.

He flew south, deeper into the woods. He searched everywhere. Nothing seemed unusual. Until!

There! A peculiar old book. Its pages whispered secrets.

Oliver tore holes.

Inside was nothing. Just dusty books.

Still, something felt peculiar.

He returned home dreaming.

One night, dreams told tales.

Creature.

He followed.

Sun.

A waterfall.

A laugh.

A rock.

Nothing.

He smiled.

There! My room.

Stars.

A ball.

Got.

So true.

Dream.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
